mapper.select:
SELECT type, name, number, data, balance_col, balance_pay, SUM(balance_col) OVER() AS balance_col_sum, SUM(balance_pay) OVER() AS balance_pay_sum FROM ( -- 客户数据（应收款） SELECT 'customer' AS type, c.name AS name, c.number AS number, c.data AS data, c.balance AS balance_col, 0.0000 AS balance_pay FROM customer c WHERE 1=1
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND c.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.number}, '%')
AND 'customer' = #{query.type}
AND c.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.data}, '%')
AND c.balance > 0 -- 只显示有应收款的客户
UNION ALL
-- 供应商数据（应付款） SELECT 'supplier' AS type, s.name AS name, s.number AS number, s.data AS data, 0.0000 AS balance_col, s.balance AS balance_pay FROM supplier s WHERE 1=1
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND s.number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.number}, '%')
AND 'supplier' = #{query.type}
AND s.data LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.data}, '%')
AND s.balance > 0 -- 只显示有应付款的供应商 ) AS combined_data ORDER BY type, name
